title: Industry Overview Exercises
description: Analyze and assess the quantum finance industry landscape

exercises.title: Industry Initiative Tracker
exercises.description: Build a system to track quantum finance initiatives

testCases.input:
tracker = InitiativeTracker()
tracker.add_initiative(Initiative('Bank A', 'optimization', Maturity.PILOT, 10))
tracker.total_investment() == 10

hints: Normalize by dividing by max value

exercises.description: Calculate potential value from quantum adoption

exercises.title: ROI Analyzer
hints: NPV = sum of discounted cash flows
